title: Chocolate Fondue
ingredients: 2 2/3 cups finely chopped semi-sweet or dark chocolate (use good quality chocolate, avoid using chocolate chips)
instructions: In a saucepan, slowly heat whipping cream until bubbles form around the edge of the pan. Remove from heat, whisk in chopped chocolate until mixture is smooth. Stir in vanilla. Transfer mixture to a fondue pot and keep warm over low heat. Serve with berries, bananas, cookies, cake cubes.
We traditionally enjoy this recipe on New Year’s Eve.
